Posts Created This Sprint

1. Edge Computing vs Cloud: The Real Tradeoffs for IoT Supply Chain Tracking

  • File: posts/2026-05-15-edge-computing-vs-cloud-iot-tradeoffs.md
  • Word Count: ~3,400 words
  • Status: Published May 15, 2026
  • Summary: Comprehensive decision framework for edge vs cloud processing in IoT supply chain deployments. Covers 7 decision factors, 4 implementation gotchas, and use-case-specific recommendations.

2. API Design Patterns That Don't Break Your Supply Chain

  • File: posts/2026-05-15-api-design-patterns-supply-chain-integration.md
  • Word Count: ~3,700 words
  • Status: Published May 15, 2026
  • Summary: Deep dive on 7 API patterns essential for supply chain: idempotency, event-driven architecture, circuit breakers, backpressure, versioning, pagination, and webhooks. Includes real-world war stories.

3. AI Agent Swarm Patterns: How Multi-Agent Systems Scale Supply Chain Intelligence

  • File: posts/2026-05-16-ai-agent-swarm-patterns.md (moved from drafts)
  • Word Count: ~2,100 words
  • Status: Published May 15, 2026
  • Summary: Architecture deep dive on distributed AI systems with 4-layer swarm pattern (Sensor → Detection → Analysis → Decision), real-world cold chain example, and scaling considerations.
